printed.name: Corkscrew Advanced
printed.setup: Starting in Roll Over position (page 42), legs overhead

movement.inhale: Rotate spine, move legs to one side
movement.exhale: Roll down side of trunk, circle legs around, rotate spine, roll up opposite side of trunk, move legs to center, return to start position

cues: Move pelvis and legs as one unit
Imagine drawing a large circle with feet around body
